case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC VS. MICHAEL LA PORTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LA PORTE, MICHAEL
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA PORTE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 EDDY STREET, #121, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LA PORTE, MICHAEL
